title: Promptable segmentation
description: Segments objects in a color image given text prompts. SAM3 implements this. Output carries per-instance masks plus a single combined mask for convenience, with aligned object/class/instance identity lists.

color.description: Color image to segment, shape [H, W, 3].

obj_ids.description: Per-instance object ids, aligned with masks.

class_names.description: Per-instance class names, aligned with obj_ids.

instance_names.description: Per-instance human-readable names, aligned with obj_ids.

masks.description: Per-instance binary masks, shape [N, H, W] (0/255).

combined_mask.description: Single combined label/grayscale mask, shape [H, W].
